title: ImportVerilog: add step-1 SV interface import
body:
Supersedes #9904.

This is the step-1 ImportVerilog interface import stack rebased onto current `main` after #10033 reverted the original merge due to a stale `basic.sv` check.

Delta from the original PR:
- cherry-picks the three step-1 commits onto current `main`
- refreshes `test/Conversion/ImportVerilog/basic.sv` for current `__unit__` naming

Validation:
- `check-circt`
- `circt-capi`
- `check-circt-unit`
- `check-circt-integration`

The full validation was rerun in `ghcr.io/circt/images/circt-integration-test:v20`.
